activities_projects.title: Comparative Habitat Study
activities_projects.objective: Compare two habitats and analyse their ecological components
steps: Select two nearby habitats such as a pond and a garden
List the biotic and abiotic components found in each habitat
Compare the diversity of organisms in both habitats
Explain why certain organisms are found only in specific habitats
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students analyse differences in habitat conditions and biodiversity
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of comparison and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Population Density Calculation
activities_projects.objective: Understand population distribution in an ecosystem
steps: Mark a 1 m × 1 m square area in a garden or field
Count the number of two plant species present
Calculate the population density of each species
Discuss reasons for differences in their population
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of calculations and reasoning (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Food Chain Construction
activities_projects.objective: Analyse feeding relationships in an ecosystem
steps: Identify at least six organisms in a grassland or forest ecosystem
Arrange them according to trophic levels
Draw a food chain diagram with arrows showing energy flow
Explain the role of producers and consumers in the chain
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand trophic levels and energy transfer

activities_projects.title: Food Web Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Understand complex feeding interactions among organisms
steps: List at least eight organisms in a natural ecosystem
Identify multiple feeding relationships among them
Create a food web diagram
Explain how the removal of one organism may affect others
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of relationships and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Role of Decomposers Investigation
steps: Place dead leaves in a small container with soil
Observe changes for several days
Note signs of decomposition such as fungi or insects
Explain how decomposers help maintain ecosystem balance
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand nutrient recycling in ecosystems

activities_projects.title: Ecosystem Interaction Mapping
activities_projects.objective: Identify interactions between biotic and abiotic components
steps: Observe a garden, pond, or farm ecosystem
List examples of interactions between organisms and environment
List interactions among organisms
Create a simple interaction map

activities_projects.title: Symbiotic Relationship Case Study
steps: Find real-life examples of mutualism, commensalism, and parasitism
Describe the organisms involved
Explain the benefits or harms in each relationship
Present findings in a short report
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand ecological interactions between species
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and correctness of case study (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Ecosystem Disturbance Simulation
activities_projects.objective: Understand how ecological changes affect ecosystems
steps: Choose a food chain such as grass → grasshopper → frog → snake
Remove one organism from the chain
Predict how this change affects the remaining organisms
Explain the cascading effects
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students analyse ecological balance and consequences of disturbance

activities_projects.title: Ecosystem Services Research
activities_projects.objective: Understand benefits ecosystems provide to humans
steps: Research how forests, wetlands, and oceans benefit humans
List ecosystem services such as oxygen production and flood control
Explain how human activities threaten these services
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the importance of ecosystem conservation

activities_projects.title: Sustainable Farming Survey
activities_projects.objective: Analyse modern and traditional farming practices
steps: Interview a local farmer or research farming practices
Record information about fertilisers, pesticides, and crop rotation
Identify sustainable farming techniques
Prepare a report suggesting eco-friendly improvements
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand links between agriculture and ecosystem health
activities_projects.evaluation: Completeness and analysis of report (10 marks)
